title: matricaria elongata
intro: Matricaria elongata, also known as the American chamomile or pineapple weed, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family that is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Matricaria elongata lie in its essential oil, which contains compounds like apigenin and chamazulene, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and soothing effects. The health benefits of Matricaria elongata include its ability to calm digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of Matricaria elongata can be found in teas, tinctures, and topical creams, with tea being the most common method of consumption, providing a soothing and calming effect.
